posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey

Nachliel from Easyapps here

Our monday form builder app, Easyform, does not add any alerts or banners to your monday forms.

Our free and starter plans only show a small logo on the bottom of the form, and our pro plan has no branding at all. See below for an example of our form in action.

  • To install Easyform click here
  • Visit our documentation site here
  • For help setting up your Easyforms and monday boards, book a call with us here. or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

I hope this helps,
Nachliel

posts.author: gwsavuk (Graham Wright)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Ian. It might depend on your account level, but on Enterprise you can - when editing the form, under Customize / Submission View there’s a Hide Branding option. If you don’t have that due to being on a lower account tier, I don’t think you can remove it.

posts.author: jack456jokky (Jack Jokky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Graham Wright:

under Customize / Submission View there’s a Hide Branding option. If you don’t have that due to being on a lower account tier, I don’t think you can remove it.

Under Customize / Submission View, there’s an option to Hide Branding. If this option isn’t available due to your account tier, you may not be able to remove it.
